generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded local preparedness programs leave communities vulnerable. The data shows that investing in civil defense infrastructure isn't just about national security—it's about everyday fairness and trust in our institutions. Don't let politicians cut corners on your safety. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
